lines.lyric_hangul: Yeah, alright
lines.lyric_translation: Yeh Alright

lines.lyric_hangul: Say the name, SEVENTEEN, yep
lines.lyric_translation: Say the Name Seventeen Yep / Your gestures hit right at my heart

lines.lyric_hangul: 내 맘 때리는 제스쳐, 만세, 삼창하지 백 번
lines.lyric_translation: You make me say mansae a hundred times but

lines.lyric: Kkaego naseon maebeon say I’m so stupid
lines.lyric_hangul: But 깨고 나선 매번 say, I'm so stupid
lines.lyric_translation: After I wake up, I always say I’m so stupid

lines.lyric_hangul: 꿈 속에선 매일 매일 (ah-ha)
lines.lyric_translation: Every day in my dreams (Ah ha)

lines.lyric_hangul: 네가 내 왼팔에 팔짱 끼지
lines.lyric_translation: You put your arms in mine

lines.lyric_hangul: 꿈만 깨면 왜 이래? (Ah-ha)
lines.lyric_translation: But when I wake up from this dream (Ah ha)

lines.lyric_hangul: 마치 영희 없는 철수 같이
lines.lyric_translation: I feel like Chulsoo without Younghee

lines.lyric_hangul: 어떡해! 아, 머리 속에 가득 할 말이 많은데
lines.lyric_translation: What do I do? My head is filled / with things I wanna say

lines.lyric_hangul: 누가 대신 말 좀 해줘
lines.lyric_translation: Can someone say them for me? / Vernon Let’s Go

lines.lyric_hangul: (Vernon, let's go!)
Uh, 그녀를 노렸어 내가
lines.lyric_translation: Uh I aimed for her, If I pick one

lines.lyric: Hanbeon jjigeosseumyeon Yeah I gotta slam dunk
lines.lyric_hangul: 한번 찍었으면, yeah, I gotta slam dunk
lines.lyric_translation: Yeah I gotta slam dunk – If you become

lines.lyric_hangul: 너만 여주가 돼줌 이건 명 작품
lines.lyric_translation: my female star, this will become a classic / S.Coups Let’s Go

parts.lyric: Neoman yeojuga dwaejum igeon myeong jakpum

lines.lyric_hangul: (S.Coups, let's do it!)
알쏭달쏭 눈빛에 쩔쩔매
lines.lyric_translation: I get flustered by your mysterious eyes

lines.lyric: Mal hanmadi geonnegiga wae himi deumnikka
lines.lyric_hangul: 말 한마디 건네기가 왜 힘이 듭니까
lines.lyric_translation: Why is it so hard to say one word to you?

lines.lyric_hangul: 아버지도 어머님께 이랬습니까? Woo
lines.lyric_translation: Dad, were you like this with mom?

lines.lyric_hangul: 무뚝뚝한 내가 이젠 평소에도 널 걱정해
lines.lyric_translation: I used to be a cold guy / But now I worry about you all the time

lines.lyric_hangul: 길을 걸을 때, baby, 위험하니까 꼭 안쪽으로 걸어
lines.lyric_translation: When you’re walking on the street baby / It’s dangerous so walk on the inside

lines.lyric_hangul: 잠깐 소녀야, 절대 넌 다른 사람에게 녹지마
lines.lyric_translation: Hold on girl, don’t ever / fall for someone else

lines.lyric_hangul: 내가 질투 나잖아
lines.lyric_translation: I’m gonna get jealous

lines.lyric_hangul: 잠깐 소녀야, 지금부터 널 내꺼라고 부를 거야
lines.lyric_translation: Hold on girl. From now on, / I’m gonna call you mine

lines.lyric_hangul: 소심해도 세심한걸 이제부터 나를 봐줘, my lady
lines.lyric_translation: I may be shy but I’m very careful / From now on, look at me my lady

lines.lyric_hangul: 만세, 만세, 만세, yeah, 만세, 만세, 만세, yeah
lines.lyric_translation: Mansae mansae mansae yeh / Mansae mansae mansae yeh

lines.lyric_hangul: 만세, 만세, 만세, yeah, 네가 나를 볼 때면, 워
lines.lyric_translation: Mansae mansae mansae yeh / When you look at me

lines.lyric_hangul: 만세, 만세, 만세, yeah, 만세, 만세, 만세, yeah
lines.lyric_translation: Mansae mansae mansae yeh / Mansae mansae mansae yeh

lines.lyric_hangul: 만세 만세 만세, yeah, 매일 너를 꿈 꾸지, 워
lines.lyric_translation: Mansae mansae mansae yeh / Every day, I dream about you

lines.lyric_hangul: 너라는 꽃이 피었습니다, 너라는 꽃을 바라보니까
lines.lyric_translation: A flower called you has blossomed / I’m only looking at a flower called you

lines.lyric_hangul: 들었나 놨다 하지 맙시다 애가 타니까
lines.lyric_translation: So don’t play games with me / Because I’m getting anxious

lines.lyric_hangul: 애가 타니까 너는 이 넓디 넓은 잔디밭의 제대로 된 홍일점
lines.lyric_translation: Because I’m getting anxious / You’re the only girl / in this large field

lines.lyric_hangul: 내 눈에는 너뿐이야 누가 이의 있습니까, hey
lines.lyric_translation: In my eyes, it’s only you / Does anyone object?

lines.lyric_hangul: 무뚝뚝한 내가 이젠 평소에도 널 걱정해
lines.lyric_translation: I used to be a cold guy / But now I worry about you all the time

lines.lyric_translation: When you’re walking on the street baby / It’s dangerous so walk on the inside

lines.lyric_translation: Hold on girl, don’t ever / fall for someone else

lines.lyric_translation: I’m gonna get jealous

lines.lyric_hangul: 잠깐 소녀야, 지금부터 널 내꺼라고 부를 거야
lines.lyric_translation: Hold on girl. From now on, / I’m gonna call you mine

lines.lyric_hangul: 소심해도 세심한걸 이제부터 나를 봐줘, my lady
lines.lyric_translation: I may be shy but I’m very careful / From now on, look at me my lady

lines.lyric_hangul: 안자고 뭐해? 너네 집 앞이야, 잠깐 나올래
lines.lyric_translation: Why aren’t you sleeping? I’m in front of your house / Can you come out for a moment?

lines.lyric_hangul: 아무리 바빠도 너를 챙겨 어디를 가도 너를 지킬 거야
lines.lyric_translation: No matter how busy I am, I’ll take care of you / Wherever I go, I’ll protect you

lines.lyric_hangul: 콩깍지 씐 김에 네 부드런 손에 깍지도 살며시 껴볼래, girl
lines.lyric_translation: As long as I’m blind with love / I’ll entwine my fingers with yours girl

parts.lyric: Kongkkakji ssuin gime ni budeureon sone

lines.lyric_hangul: Bad, bad, bad, bad, girl, 더 이상은 밀지마
lines.lyric_translation: Bad Bad Bad Bad Girl / Don’t push me away anymore
